span.p: NO - never retuned or more than 12 months ago

span.p: NO - some Reds have no named drivers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: YES - all Reds have named drivers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Can I trust the current tier output for a high-stakes action?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Has the tier been retuned against a completed renewal cycle within the last 12 months?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: LOW CONFIDENCE - mark tier output as provisional - retune before acting on the list for high-stakes renewals

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Are all active signals validated - back-test pass AND no provisional-only signals driving Red accounts?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: MEDIUM CONFIDENCE - provisional signals add uncertainty - weight CS judgment more heavily on Red accounts driven by provisional signals only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is source data fresher than 24 hours for the key signals in this snapshot?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: DATA FRESHNESS GAP - do not act until pipeline catches up - surface data-pending flag

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the explainability panel show named drivers for every Red account in scope?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: EXPLAINABILITY GAP - do not present driverless Reds as confident signals - investigate mart before QBR

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: HIGH CONFIDENCE - tier output is reliable for this action - proceed
